milestone.name: visualization deep-dive overhaul
milestone.goal: Presentation-grade, dependency-aware pruning visualization pipeline with backend-agnostic notebook flow.

notebook.data_leakage_policy: Use validation split for pruning calibration and visual scoring; reserve test split for final evaluation/inference.
notebook.legacy_compat: Legacy single-file names are auto-discovered in policy cell fallback logic.
stability_guards: Skip heavy global GIF rendering for dense graphs (e.g., DenseNet) to reduce kernel OOM risk.
Finetuned checkpoint is loaded into pruned architecture for inference consistency.

known_issues_or_risks: Some heavy GIF outputs may be intentionally skipped for very dense architectures to preserve notebook stability.
MobileNet recovery quality may vary significantly with pruning aggressiveness and safe-mode settings.
Presentation legibility for method-battle/global-surgery animations can still be improved for dense graphs.
next_actions: Validate per-model artifact completeness via phase manifests after each run.
Improve animation readability (label density, final-state persistence, delta emphasis).
Document a one-path presenter workflow for pretrained-only demos.
